intro: Party Pool is a fun and fast-paced game where players compete in colorful pool matches. Challenge yourself against smart AI opponents, or go head-to-head with a second player
description: Party Pool captures the laid-back vibe of hanging out in a pub with friends, casually playing billiards and enjoying the moment. Whether you’re unwinding solo against AI or sharing the experience with a second player, it’s all about relaxed fun, friendly competition, and good times.
